Localization.Description: An alert is sent or received, or a session is closed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} protocol alert is received on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
A {protocol} protocol alert is sent on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
A session that was established from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is closed on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
